title: Giant Spider hit applies non-stacking 2-cycle DOT

card.rawText: When this creature hits, the targeted creature receives 10 damage once per turn cycle, for 2 turn cycles.

plan.title: Giant Spider hit applies non-stacking 2-cycle DOT
plan.summary: On hit, target receives 10 DOT at end of Combat for two turn cycles and duplicate DOT should not stack.

notes: Player_1 Giant Spider attacks player_2 primary creature.

steps: Resolve Spider attack with forced hit.
Verify DOT status is applied to target.
Advance to end of Combat and process DOT tick.
Advance one full turn cycle and process second DOT tick.
Attempt another Spider hit while first DOT is active to verify no duplicate stack if supported.
manualVerification: Confirm DOT tick timing is end of Combat Phase, not immediately on hit unless the engine intentionally logs the first tick there.
riskNotes: If duplicate hit setup is cumbersome, record non-stack check as manual.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Supported route; validates trigger, tick timing, duration, and stack rule.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
